The Maison

Born from obsession. Built for one.

Gandhi and Co. is a fine jewellery house crafting rings, bracelets, necklaces and pendants in 14kt gold with ethically sourced lab-grown diamonds. On rare occasion we accept commissions for extraordinary one-of-one sculptural objects that transcend jewellery entirely.

Every piece begins with one person's vision and ends as the only version of that thing that will ever exist.

100% Fully bespoke
Every single piece
14kt Gold as standard
All jewellery
∞ Customisation
possibilities

“We do not make jewellery.
We make the only version
of something that will ever exist.”

— Gandhi and Co.

Rare Sculptural Objects

Beyond jewellery. Into legend.

On rare occasion, Gandhi and Co. accepts commissions for objects that transcend the world of jewellery entirely. Diamond-encrusted automotive sculptures in 925 silver. Each one a one-of-one work — never repeated, never replicated.

Extremely Limited · Invitation to Commission
The Pavé Porsche
Commission No. 001 · 925 Silver · Pink Lab Diamonds · 2024
Side Profile
Full Body Pavé Setting
Precision Detail
Thousands of Hand-Set Stones
Rear Architecture
Diffuser · Spoiler · Exhaust in Diamond
Signature Object · 2024

The Pavé
Porsche

Every surface. Every curve. Thousands of hand-set pink lab-grown diamonds over 925 sterling silver. One vision. One client. One object that will never exist again.

Commission a Sculpture →
The Craft

The Commission
Process

01
The Vision

You bring the idea. A ring, a sculpture, a memory. Nothing is too ambitious.

02
The Design

Scale, stones, metals, hidden details — translated into exact specifications before a single stone is touched.

03
The Craft

Each stone placed by hand. Weeks of meticulous work. Perfection sets its own schedule.

04
The Delivery

The only one of its kind — delivered with a certificate of singularity. Yours, permanently.

Begin Your Commission

What shall we build for you?

Every commission begins with a conversation. Whether a ring, necklace, or something that has never existed before — tell us your vision and we will make it real, exactly once, for you.

CommissionFully Bespoke
Jewellery14kt Gold + Lab Diamonds
Sculptures925 Silver + Lab Diamonds
Lead Time8 – 16 Weeks
PricingOn Enquiry Only
DeliveryWorldwide
